header_21.raw_response: I tend to fall somewhere in the middle when it comes to deadlines. I value preparation and organization, but I also understand the pressures of life and the realities of limited time and resources. While I try to plan ahead, there are times when I find myself working late or rushing to meet a deadline due to unexpected challenges. However, I don’t often leave things until the very last minute, and I prefer to complete tasks early when possible.
